creator: nemysis@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a clean install of PC-BSD 9.2 with ZFS.

I understand that 9.2 is supported til June 2014, and upgraded
to PC-BSD 10.0-RELEASE-p4.

FreeBSD and PC-BSD were working on this PC from 9.0 to 9.2.

Hardware details

Asus Crosshair IV Formula, AMD 890FX, AM3, CrossFireX

​http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=msk&sektion=4

Marvell Yukon 88E8059 Gigabit Ethernet

I bought this for ZFS performance enhancement.

Corsair Vengeance (2x, 8GB, DDR3-2000, DIMM)


I have seen that VirtualBox and nVidia drivers (.ko)
built in FreeBSD 9.2 are not compatible with FreeBSD 10,
but can't have a new build because of not having a working Internet connection.


Later checked messages with

pkg update -f
Updating repository catalogue
msk0: watchdog timeout
..
pkg: Unable to find catalogs


When i try to enable LAN ROM in BIOS, then PC freezes at times.


I have searched Internet and looked at 

​http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/config-network-setup.html


This was before too problem with msk0, em0, re0 and soo on

​http://forums.freebsd.org/viewtopic.php?t=40701

​https://forums.freebsd.org/viewtopic.php?&t=10183

​http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2013-July/042853.html

​http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2013-October/075599.html

​https://bugs.freenas.org/issues/1850

​http://zfsguru.com/forum/zfsgurudevelopment/542


Not helps

service netif restart && service routing restart

ifconfig msk0 polling

ifconfig msk0 -tso

sysctl -a | grep tcp.tso
net.inet.tcp.tso: 1

sysctl net.inet.tcp.tso=0

watchdog -t 0

I use FreeBSD/PC-BSD and no other Operational Systems, but tried coldboot for several hours.

Fix: 

Please fix this mistake

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base/head/sys/dev/msk/if_msk.c?view=log
How-To-Repeat: Driver for ethernet msk0 not works more.
